{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Fireball
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Malachi]] can shoot a screaming ball of orange flame from his hand that contains faces like burning ghosts.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c19">''House of Blades'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
